description_long: This is an adult male standing with his arms crossed, dressed in a collared button-up shirt and fitted trousers. He has a clean, professional appearance, with his shirt sleeves rolled up to the elbows and his shirt tucked into his pants. His posture is relaxed yet confident, with his weight distributed evenly on both feet. He is wearing formal dress shoes, and his hair is short and neatly styled. The figure is life-sized and proportionate, suitable for placement in urban environments such as sidewalks, plazas, or office entrances.
description: A standing adult male with arms crossed, wearing a button-up shirt, trousers, and dress shoes, with a neat, short hairstyle.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the man's face, crossed arms, and full outfit details.
description_view_1: Left side profile, highlighting the arm position and side of the shirt and trousers.
description_view_2: Rear view, showing the back of the shirt, trousers, and head.
description_view_3: Right side profile, displaying the crossed arms and side of the body.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve button-up shirt and fitted trousers with rolled sleeves
